# zstack_nvme_server (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage NVMe servers in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the NVMe server.
- `transport` (String) The transport protocol of the NVMe server.

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the NVMe server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the NVMe server.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the NVMe server.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the NVMe server.
